contribution_rows.headline_evidence: validation seed stability=5/5 with matched/target/text mean=0.356/0.252/0.326; test seed stability=5/5 with matched/target/text mean=0.378/0.276/0.350
contribution_rows.main_metric: 3B payload; test min lift over target=0.102; min lift over same-byte text=0.028; min lift over best destructive=0.100; min CI95 low vs target=0.038
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This promotes OpenBookQA as a second public benchmark beyond ARC and shows the public-basis packet still beats target-only, same-byte text, and destructive controls at 3B. The source decision is still a Qwen choice-loglikelihood cache, so the next ICLR gate is a more native latent/source endpoint and GPU systems measurement.
contribution_rows.status: new second public-benchmark positive gate and stronger rate point

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: official SciQ splits materialized 11679/1000/1000 train/validation/test; validation matched/target/text=0.712/0.246/0.706
contribution_rows.main_metric: matched-source minus same-byte text=0.006; matched-source minus target=0.466; CI95 low vs target=0.425
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: SciQ confirms the source signal is strong, but short answer strings let the matched-byte text control nearly catch up, so using it as a headline benchmark would weaken the fairness story. Keep it as a reviewer-facing limitation and benchmark-selection rationale.
contribution_rows.status: documented benchmark limitation, not a promoted headline benchmark

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: labeled train/validation materialized as 9741/1221 with no overlap; 12B validation matched/target/text=0.440/0.206/0.440; 2B relaxed-margin seed stability=5/5
contribution_rows.main_metric: 2B min lift over target=0.232; min lift over same-byte text=0.013; strict 0.02 text-margin pass count=0/5
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: CommonsenseQA confirms the source signal is not science-only, but same-byte text is too close to the packet under the strict 0.02 margin and Hugging Face test labels are unavailable. Use this as the next live method-improvement target, not as an ICLR headline row yet.
contribution_rows.status: live non-science diagnostic, not a strict headline benchmark yet

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: labeled train/validation materialized as 39905/10042 with no overlap; 1024-row fixed run matched/target/text=0.460/0.233/0.386; 5-seed stability=5/5; source-label copy=0.462
contribution_rows.main_metric: 2B payload; 5B framed record; min lift over target=0.227; min lift over same-byte text=0.074; matched minus source-label copy=-0.002; min lift over best destructive=0.188; min CI95 low vs target=0.186
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: The packet clears target-only, destructive controls, and same-byte choice-prefix text, but it does not beat the stronger one-byte top-label-copy control. Treat HellaSwag as a method-improvement surface until a packet carries more than the source top choice and then widen to full validation.
contribution_rows.status: strong non-science slice, weakened by top-label-copy control

contribution_rows.contribution: HellaSwag label-copy and score-packet headroom diagnostic
contribution_rows.headline_evidence: metadata controls clean=True; matched/source-label-copy=0.460/0.462; best rank-bin heldout/source-label heldout=0.465/0.465
contribution_rows.main_metric: matched minus best metadata/activity control=0.215; matched minus source-label copy=-0.002; top-2 oracle heldout=0.734; score packet delta=0.002
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: The source top-2 contains substantial headroom, but confidence margin alone does not recover it. Next method branch should learn or calibrate a second-choice repair signal rather than simply quantizing the top-vs-runner-up margin.

contribution_rows.contribution: HellaSwag train-only public receiver repair falsification
contribution_rows.headline_evidence: train-only public receiver dev accuracy=0.309; source-label/public-only/top2-rerank/gated=0.462/0.260/0.364/0.413
contribution_rows.main_metric: best repair condition=public_if_in_source_top2; best repair minus source-label copy=-0.049; source top-2 oracle=0.716; public prediction in source top-2 rate=0.485
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: A public train-only receiver scorer cannot recover the HellaSwag top-2 headroom. This prunes the eval-only/public-feature repair branch and makes the next valid gate train-split source-score calibration or a true source hidden-summary repair packet.
contribution_rows.status: new negative method gate / branch pruned

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: scored train rows=512; selected policy=top2_margin_8bin; dev/eval=0.461/0.447; source-label/trained-label=0.462/0.459
contribution_rows.main_metric: selected minus best label-copy=-0.015; source top-2/top-4 oracle=0.716/1.000; train source scoring latency=412.72s; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: Train-source score shape does not beat source-label copy, despite large oracle headroom. This weakens score-only HellaSwag repair and makes source hidden-summary or residual-code repair the next live branch.
contribution_rows.status: new negative source-score method gate / branch weakened

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: scored/hidden train rows=512; selected layer/ridge=-1/100.0; hidden-label/source-label eval=0.414/0.462; hidden-packet eval=0.413
contribution_rows.main_metric: hidden packet minus source-label copy=-0.049; hidden packet minus same-byte text=0.055; CI95 vs source-label=-0.086/-0.013; source top-2 oracle=0.716; hidden train/eval forward=257.7/332.3s; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: A last-layer train-only source-hidden ridge scorer overfits train and underperforms raw source-label copy on frozen validation, even though the packet still beats same-byte text and destructive controls. This prunes simple hidden-label/hidden-residual repair; any revived hidden branch must use a different common-basis learner, layer sweep, denoising/OT objective, or cross-model supervision.
contribution_rows.status: new negative hidden-summary method gate / branch weakened

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: scored/hidden train rows=512; selected view/ridge=score_hidden_residual/1000.0; dev/eval=0.492/0.499; best label-copy=0.462
contribution_rows.main_metric: selected minus best label-copy=0.037; CI95 low/high=0.010/0.061; zero/wrong/roll hidden controls=0.462/0.396/0.360; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This is the first HellaSwag repair row that beats source-label copy with positive paired uncertainty while preserving the fixed-byte source-private packet boundary. A separate anchored split-stability gate now tests whether the score+hidden-residual method survives multiple train/dev splits; this row remains the single-split method discovery artifact.
contribution_rows.status: new positive hard-surface method gate feeding anchored stability

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: anchored split seeds pass=5/5; eval mean/min/max=0.503/0.494/0.528; unrestricted diagnostic pass=3/5
contribution_rows.main_metric: min delta vs best label-copy=0.032; min CI95 low=0.007; min zero-hidden delta=0.032; wrong/candidate-roll max=0.400/0.377; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This upgrades HellaSwag from a single split to a cached split-stable anchored method, but a new train-row-sample stress now shows the branch is not yet robust enough for headline promotion.
contribution_rows.status: positive cached split gate, weakened by train-sample stress

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: train sample pass map={'1729': True, '2027': False}; split rows pass=5/6; new sample pass count=0
contribution_rows.main_metric: mean/min delta vs best label-copy=0.021/-0.045; min CI95 low=-0.072; min zero-hidden delta=-0.045; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: The original train sample remains positive, but the fresh 2027 train sample fails one split row. This weakens the current dense hidden-residual denoiser and points to either stronger train-sample aggregation, a stability-selected ridge policy, or a new SAE/common-basis packet.
contribution_rows.status: new negative robustness gate / HellaSwag branch demoted from headline

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: aggregation=mean_zscore; component models=9; train samples=3 with new samples=2; eval/source-label/best-label=0.513/0.462/0.464; jackknife subbags pass=3/3
contribution_rows.main_metric: delta vs best label-copy=0.049; CI95 low/high=0.028/0.071; delta vs score-only bagged=0.051; zero/wrong/roll controls=0.462/0.438/0.390; jackknife min delta/CI low=0.032/0.010; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This directly addresses the fresh train-sample failure by bagging over train-row samples and split seeds without increasing packet bytes. The third train sample and 2-of-3 jackknife subbags now pass, so the next ICLR gate is a frozen larger/full-validation slice plus native systems rows.
contribution_rows.status: new positive third-sample robustness gate / live ICLR method candidate

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: slice=1024:2048; eval/source-label/best-label=0.454/0.409/0.414; train samples=3; jackknife subbags pass=3/3
contribution_rows.main_metric: delta vs best label-copy=0.040; CI95 low/high=0.020/0.058; delta vs score-only bagged=0.045; zero/wrong/roll controls=0.409/0.387/0.372; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This is the first frozen post-first1024 validation-slice pass for the bagged hidden-innovation packet and directly reduces slice-overfit risk. It upgrades HellaSwag to a headline-candidate hard benchmark, but the comfortable ICLR gate is still full validation or predeclared multi-slice stress plus native systems rows.
contribution_rows.status: new positive frozen heldout-slice gate / HellaSwag headline-candidate

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: slices=4/4 contiguous; rows=4096; weighted selected/best-label/score-only=0.494/0.452/0.446; latest heldout slice=3072:4096
contribution_rows.main_metric: min delta vs best label-copy=0.034; min CI95 low=0.012; min delta vs score-only/zero-hidden=0.045/0.045; wrong/roll max=0.455/0.405; record bytes=5B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This is the strongest Mac-local HellaSwag evidence so far: the same 2B raw / 5B framed source-private hidden-innovation packet clears validation rows 0:4096 under label-copy, score-only, zero-hidden, corrupted-hidden, and jackknife checks. It still does not replace the remaining validation slices, a strict cross-family falsification pair, or native NVIDIA systems rows.
contribution_rows.status: new positive 4-slice gate / stronger HellaSwag headline-candidate

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 7 HellaSwag repair rows audited; systems audit=True; method gate=True; native queue allowed=False
contribution_rows.main_metric: best repair=hidden_innovation_repair with delta vs source-label copy=0.037; strict required delta=0.02; max oracle gap remaining=0.303
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This promotes the hidden-innovation HellaSwag branch past the local method margin, while still blocking native queue promotion until NVIDIA/vLLM/SGLang systems rows exist. Treat this as a live positive branch, not a final headline, until seed/fold stability confirms it.
contribution_rows.status: new acceptance gate / hidden-innovation method row promoted

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: validation seed stability=5/5 with matched mean/min=0.386/0.381; test seed stability=5/5 with matched mean/min=0.344/0.344
contribution_rows.main_metric: test min lift over target=0.078; min lift over best destructive=0.067; min lift over same-byte text=0.033; min CI95 low vs target=0.039
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This strengthens the common-basis story by replacing direct hashed coordinates with public train-anchor-relative similarities while preserving the ARC pass. It does not beat the direct hashed basis by enough to claim anchor-relative superiority; anchor-identity/value-shuffle and random-anchor controls are still needed. The source decision is still a Qwen choice cache; a second public benchmark or stronger learned hidden-state endpoint remains needed for ICLR.
contribution_rows.status: positive common-basis robustness evidence, not a hashed-basis superiority claim

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: ID-shuffle validation/test pass counts=0/5 and 0/5; value-shuffle validation/test pass counts=0/5 and 0/5; random shared anchors validation/test=5/5 and 5/5
contribution_rows.main_metric: test matched mean ID/value/random=0.248/0.246/0.344; target/text=0.265/0.311
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: ID/value mismatch collapse shows sender and receiver need the same coordinate chart. Random shared anchors passing shows semantic train anchors are not necessary, so the safe claim is public common-basis packet communication rather than semantic-anchor superiority.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: validation matched/target/text=0.388/0.244/0.348; test matched/target/text=0.344/0.265/0.311; seed stability validation/test=5/5 and 5/5
contribution_rows.main_metric: test lift over target=0.078; lift over best destructive=0.078; lift over same-byte text=0.033; seed-stability min CI95 low vs target=0.038
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This removes the receiver-BGE packet-construction caveat by using an agreed public hashed basis, but the source decision is still Qwen choice log-likelihood rather than a learned hidden-state communication endpoint; native systems rows remain pending.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: test source scoring=251.0 ms/question; receiver decode p50/p95=31.7/104.3 us; peak RSS=7261.3 MiB
contribution_rows.main_metric: 12B payload / 15B framed record; single-request cacheline/DMA=64/128B; batch64 line/DMA per request=15.0/16.0B
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This closes a Mac-local phase/RSS/byte trace gap for ARC, but native NVIDIA/vLLM TTFT/TPOT/goodput/HBM rows and source-KV baselines remain pending.
contribution_rows.status: new Mac-local systems trace for the public endpoint

contribution_rows.contribution: Qwen-hidden to BGE source-latent endpoint diagnostic
contribution_rows.headline_evidence: validation matched/target/text=0.281/0.244/0.348; source accuracy before packet=0.388
contribution_rows.main_metric: matched-source-latent minus same-byte text=-0.067; CI95 low vs target=-0.035; train alignment cosine mean=0.475
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: Direct ridge alignment from Qwen hidden summaries to BGE residuals is not strong enough; future latent endpoints need better common-basis learning, denoising receivers, or OT/Procrustes-style regularization before promotion.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: validation 5/5 seeds pass; test 5/5 seeds pass
contribution_rows.main_metric: test mean/min matched=0.344/0.341; min lift over target=0.076; min lift over same-byte text=0.031; min CI95 low vs target=0.038
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This closes the random-projection luck objection for ARC, but it still reuses the Qwen source-choice cache and does not replace the need for a cleaner model-to-model endpoint or a second public task.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: validation matched/target/text=0.385/0.244/0.348; test matched/target/text=0.346/0.265/0.311
contribution_rows.main_metric: test lift over target=0.080; lift over best destructive=0.080; CI95 low vs target=0.046; candidate derangement=0.213

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: official ARC-Challenge splits materialized 1119/299/1172 train/validation/test; local smoke validation/eval overlap=0
contribution_rows.main_metric: fixed 12B contract; 10 required controls; public result ready=False

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 6/6 selected n512 rows pass after global validation-selected budget {'47': 12, '53': 12, '59': 12}
contribution_rows.main_metric: selected accuracy min=0.652; max best control=0.275; min CI95 lower bound vs base=0.098

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 6/6 n512 cross-family rows pass at one fixed 12B rate across seeds [47, 53, 59]
contribution_rows.main_metric: min accuracy=0.652; max best control=0.275; min CI95 lower bound vs base=0.098
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This removes the need for per-seed eval budgets, but it is an eval-only audit; ICLR still needs a train-only validation rule or predeclared operating-point argument for choosing 12B.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 6/6 selected n512 rows pass after validation-selected budgets {'47': 14, '53': 12, '59': 12}
contribution_rows.main_metric: selected accuracy min=0.652; max best control=0.273; min CI95 lower bound vs base=0.098
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This removes the worst hand-picked-budget concern for the current seed-repeat surface, but the global fixed-budget policy still does not pass; final ICLR needs a larger train-only validation split or a method adjustment that makes one budget clear every seed.

contribution_rows.contribution: Unified train-only train-donor anti-shuffle packet method
contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 6/6 n128 cross-family seed-repeat rows pass; 3/3 n512 seeds pass under the 12-14B frontier
contribution_rows.main_metric: 12-14B accuracy 0.648-0.750 vs base 0.500-0.625; n512 min CI95 lower bound vs base=0.096
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This removes the eval-donor caveat for the unified train-only stack and clears n512 seed repeats, but still needs a locked validation-based byte-selection rule, public benchmark transfer, and native NVIDIA/vLLM systems measurements.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 6/6 n512 cross-family seed-repeat rows pass; 3/3 seeds cross-family pass
contribution_rows.main_metric: 12B train-only receiver accuracy 0.500-0.625 vs target 0.250; max best control=0.260; min CI95 lower bound vs target=0.213
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This clears the cross-family train-only receiver gate for the source-atom packet, but same-family is still limited by a structured-text control; use it as the receiver component inside the new train-donor anti-shuffle stack.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 9/9 n512 seed-repeat rows pass; 3/3 seeds cross-family pass
contribution_rows.main_metric: 12B accuracy 0.625-0.750 vs live base 0.500-0.500; min lift over base=0.125; rate pass rows=8/12
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: The sender packet builder is train-only, but the receiver dictionary still uses public eval-disjoint calibration; keep as a separate sender contribution now that train-donor anti-shuffle is the unified branch.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 9/9 n512 seed-repeat rows pass; 3/3 seeds cross-family pass
contribution_rows.main_metric: 12B accuracy 0.625-0.625 vs live base 0.500-0.500; min lift over base=0.125
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: Packet builder excludes the eval family from builder calibration, but the candidate dictionary is still public eval-disjoint; true train-only cross-family generalization and real benchmarks remain ICLR gates.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: 9/9 n512 seed-repeat rows pass; 3/3 seeds cross-family pass
contribution_rows.main_metric: 8B accuracy 0.875-0.875 vs live base 0.500-0.625; min lift over base=0.250

contribution_rows.main_metric: 8.0B payload / 11.0B record; accuracy 0.500-0.625
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: Still benchmark-specific; needs broader tasks and native systems rows for comfortable ICLR.

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: live cross-family rows pass 6/6 and same-family rows pass 3/3
contribution_rows.main_metric: cross-family min matched=0.500; max best control=0.260
contribution_rows.remaining_gap: This is strict within the current synthetic family split, not yet unrelated real LLM families.

contribution_rows.main_metric: threshold 0.48 clean rows=9/9

contribution_rows.main_metric: live matched p50 margin=0.243; best-control condition=permuted_teacher_receiver

contribution_rows.headline_evidence: no source text/KV exposure; min KV proxy/live-record ratio 4887.3x
contribution_rows.main_metric: resident sparse decode p50=5.232 us/request; packet-ring batch64 p95=0.674 ns/request

cross_benchmark_systems_comparator_headl.claim_scope: Cross-benchmark byte/state-exposure comparator for source-private packets. KV/cache rows are one-source-token byte floors from the local Qwen2.5-0.5B config, not native C2C/KVComm/QJL/TurboQuant quality or throughput measurements.

native_readiness_ledger_headline.claim_allowed: Mac-local source-private packet accuracy/byte-boundary/transport proxy evidence.
native_readiness_ledger_headline.native_blocker: NVIDIA/vLLM/SGLang run is still required for systems claims.

native_systems_benchmark_plan_headline.acceptance_rule: Native systems complete only when all required rows report quality, TTFT, TPOT, ITL, goodput, tokens/s, peak GPU memory, HBM read/write, PCIe/NVLink transfer, payload bytes, and source-exposure flags.

novelty_matrix.communicated_object: rate-capped private evidence packet decoded with target candidate side information
novelty_matrix.systems_axis: bytes, local latency, candidate accuracy, controls

novelty_matrix.paper_role: systems byte-floor comparator and future vector-packet ablation

novelty_matrix.communicated_object: JL-projected sign sketches for inner products/KV
novelty_matrix.paper_role: matched-byte vector sketch baseline if latent branch is promoted

novelty_matrix.communicated_object: learned hard/soft prompt or prefix state inserted into the target context/model
novelty_matrix.paper_role: conditioning contrast; the source-private packet is a per-example discrete boundary record, not a token, soft prompt, or prefix cache
novelty_matrix.requires_model_internals: soft/prefix variants require learned continuous state or prefix KV-like state
novelty_matrix.systems_axis: extra prompt/prefix tokens or vectors, target context/KV growth, tuning storage

novelty_matrix.comparison: Prompt/text compression such as LLMLingua-family methods
novelty_matrix.paper_role: structured text/compression framing; query-aware text relay is the local control

novelty_matrix.communicated_object: syndrome/source code with decoder side information
novelty_matrix.paper_role: theory framing, not empirical LLM baseline
inspiration for future learned receiver; not current claim

readiness: train-donor positive-method paper branch plus seed-stable ARC-Challenge and OpenBookQA public-basis endpoints; cross-benchmark source-state byte-floor systems comparator and native vLLM/SGLang benchmark plan now strengthen the systems story; HellaSwag single-denoiser hidden innovation fails fresh train-row-sample stress, but the predeclared bagged hidden-innovation packet now passes three-train-sample, 2-of-3 jackknife, frozen heldout validation-slice stress, and a four-contiguous-slice validation[0:4096] stress as a live ICLR headline-candidate pending remaining-slice/full-validation stress, strict cross-family falsification, and native systems rows
remaining_iclr_risks: Production serving TTFT/TPOT/throughput on NVIDIA GPUs is still missing; the cross-benchmark systems comparator and native benchmark plan define the table, but they are not native serving results.

ARC-Challenge, OpenBookQA, and HellaSwag now have seed-stable public-basis endpoints, but the source scorer is still a local Qwen log-likelihood bridge rather than a learned hidden-state communication endpoint.

HellaSwag anchored hidden-innovation repair passes cached split stability but fails the fresh 2027 train-row-sample stress; the new bagged gate now rescues the three-sample stress, passes 2-of-3 jackknife subbags, clears frozen validation[1024:2048], validation[2048:3072], and validation[3072:4096] heldout slices, and passes a contiguous validation[0:4096] multi-slice stress. It still needs remaining-slice/full-validation stress before comfortable headline promotion.
HellaSwag source top-2 oracle headroom is still large after the hidden-innovation repair, so reviewers will expect ablations explaining why the repair recovers only part of the headroom.

The train-only public receiver HellaSwag repair probe also fails below source-label copy, so the next repair gate needs train-split source scores or hidden source summaries rather than public lexical features alone.
The 512-row train-source-score HellaSwag repair probe also fails below source-label copy, so score-shape repair is weakened unless a substantially richer train-source feature family is introduced.
The 512-row train-source-hidden HellaSwag label-copy repair fails below source-label copy, while hidden-innovation residual denoising succeeds; the paper must explain this distinction clearly.
The HellaSwag repair acceptance card now promotes only the hidden-innovation row locally and still blocks native-queue promotion until native systems evidence exists.
SciQ is documented as a benchmark-selection limitation because same-byte answer-text saturates despite strong source signal.
CommonsenseQA confirms non-science source signal, but same-byte text is still too close under the strict text-margin gate.
Anchor-coordinate controls show ID/value mismatch collapse, but random shared anchors pass; do not claim semantic train-anchor superiority.
The direct Qwen-hidden to BGE residual endpoint failed validation, so deeper latent endpoints need better common-basis learning before promotion.
The top live method is candidate-local and thresholded; the paper must show the threshold frontier and controls clearly.
Same-family structured-text controls remain unpromoted and should be framed as a limitation or cut from headline claims.
The headline method is protocol/candidate-side-information communication, not universal semantic latent transfer.
Simple learned cross-family masked-innovation receivers failed; a future shared-dictionary/crosscoder method needs feature knockout before promotion.
The final paper must show text relay catches up at higher byte budgets to avoid unfair-baseline criticism.
